title: Doomsday catastrophe - 末日灾变
description:
生存下去！！！
Doomsday catastrophe | 末日灾变  modpack
body:
# Chinese 中文
末日灾变整合包描述

本整合包以丧尸危机为背景，重构《我的世界》生存体验。核心玩法围绕夜间尸潮攻防展开——僵尸群获得强化行动路径与团队协作AI，在月光下携带武器发起集体冲锋。通过爆炸、火焰蔓延与环境破坏，营造出紧迫的末世战场氛围。

生存者需利用：

① 扩展武器系统（冷兵器/简易枪械）

② 堡垒建设与陷阱协同

③ 稀缺的急救与照明资源

在尸群环伺中建立昼夜循环防御体系，体验策略性生存挑战。

注：此介绍由AI生成

# English 英文
Doomsday Catastrophe - Minecraft Modpack Description

This modpack transforms your world into a desperate survival scenario. Black-skinned zombies with glowing eyes swarm the night, now enhanced with tactical pathfinding to coordinate attacks. Witness villages ignite under explosive assaults as undead hordes wield weapons and breach defenses.

Core Mechanics:

• Dynamic horde behaviors (group charging/block destruction)

• Expanded armory (melee/craftable firearms) with durability decay

Survival Focus:

Resources deplete rapidly during siege events. Prioritize fortification upgrades, medical supplies, and terrain manipulation to withstand the escalating threat cycles.

Note: This introduction is generated by AI

# Information 信息
游戏版本：1.20.1
Game Version:1.20.1

~~~~
Equipment requirements/设备要求:

JAVA版本:JDK17
JAVA Version:JDK17

请保证运行环境是Windows 64x
Make sure that the running environment is Windows 64x

为游戏分配的最低运行内存（RAM）> 16GB
The minimum operating memory (RAM) allocated for the game > 16GB
~~~~

如果您没有公共 IP 并想与他人联机，请尝试使用此模组：[[op2p]更好的P2P联机MCOpenP2P](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/18973.html)
或
